title: Notifications -  Device updating
scenario: Verify that a "Device software is updating..." notification appears when a device update begins, and tapping it while the app is in the background opens the Software Update screen with the DFU progress bar.
steps: Start a device software update process.
Observe the notification area for the message "Device software is updating...".
Send the app to the background (e.g., press the Home button).
Tap the notification "Device software is updating...".
Observe the app opening and the screen displayed.
expected: 1. The notification "Device software is updating..." appears when the update begins. 2. Tapping the notification while the app is in the background opens the app to the Software Update screen showing the DFU progress bar.
